What is the hospital name ?
Sheet1.Column2: All Is Well Hospital is a modern multi-speciality healthcare institution located in Burhanpur, Madhya Pradesh. The founder and chairman of All is Well Hospiital is Mr. Anand Prakash Chouksey. The hospital was established in 2019 with the vision of delivering high-quality, ethical, and patient-centered medical care to people in and around the region. The mission of All Is Well Hospital is to provide accessible, affordable, and advanced healthcare services with compassion and integrity. The hospital aims to treat every patient with dignity, ensuring transparent communication, ethical medical practices, and evidence-based treatment protocols. Its vision is to become a leading healthcare provider in the region by continuously upgrading infrastructure, adopting advanced medical technologies, and nurturing a team of skilled specialists dedicated to improving community health outcomes. It offers comprehensive healthcare services ranging from outpatient consultations to advanced critical care management. The hospital combines experienced medical professionals, updated medical technology, and a compassionate care approach to ensure patients receive accurate diagnosis, effective treatment, and continuous monitoring. It is designed to cater to emergency cases, surgical procedures, preventive healthcare, and long-term disease management, making it a trusted healthcare destination for families in Burhanpur and nearby districts. Key specialties include Cardiac Sciences, Neuro Sciences, Anesthesiology & Critical Care, Dental Sciences, Obstetrics & Gynaecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Medicine, Orthopedics, Oncology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology, Psychiatry, Dermatology, Pediatrics & Neonatology, and more. The hospital operates 24×7 for emergency and critical care services. All Is Well Hospital is located near Macro Vision Academy in Burhanpur, Madhya Pradesh, 450331, India. Being situated in a central and recognized educational zone makes it easier for patients and visitors to identify the hospital. Clear signboards and an organized entry system help patients reach the reception and registration areas without confusion.

What all are the health packages ?
Sheet1.Column2: At All Is Well Hospital, we offer a variety of specially designed health check-up packages to meet the preventive and diagnostic healthcare needs of adults, women, children, and patients managing chronic conditions such as diabetes. Currently, we provide five major health packages: Basic Wellness, Comprehensive Wellness, Comprehensive Women Wellness, Diabetic Wellness, and Healthy Child Wellness. Each package includes a carefully selected combination of laboratory tests and diagnostic evaluations at discounted rates to make preventive healthcare affordable and accessible.                                                                                                                                        The Basic Wellness Package is priced at ₹899, discounted from the original price of ₹1550, offering a 42% discount. This package is designed for routine health screening and includes Complete Blood Count (CBC) to evaluate overall blood health, Random Blood Sugar (B. Sugar – R) to check glucose levels, Electrocardiogram (ECG) to assess heart rhythm and cardiac function, SGPT to evaluate liver enzyme levels, Serum Calcium to check bone health and metabolic balance, Serum Creatinine to assess kidney function, and HbA1c to measure average blood sugar levels over the past three months. This package is ideal for individuals who want a basic yet essential overview of their general health status.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               The Comprehensive Wellness Package is available at ₹4999, reduced from ₹8540, providing a 41% discount. This package offers a more detailed health assessment and includes Vitamin D testing to evaluate bone and immune health, Vitamin B12 levels to detect deficiencies affecting nerve and blood health, Blood Group identification, Lipid Profile to assess cholesterol and heart disease risk, Serum Calcium for bone metabolism, Physician Consultation for professional medical evaluation of reports, and Dietitian Consultation to provide personalized nutritional advice. This package is suitable for individuals seeking an in-depth preventive health check-up along with expert guidance.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         The Comprehensive Women Wellness Package is priced at ₹3499, discounted from ₹7470, offering a 53% discount. This package is specifically tailored to women’s health needs and includes Complete Blood Count (CBC), Blood Sugar tests (Fasting and Postprandial – F/PP) to monitor glucose control, Lipid Profile to assess cholesterol levels, Renal Function Test (RFT) to evaluate kidney health, Liver Function Test (LFT) to monitor liver performance, HbA1c for long-term blood sugar monitoring, and a Free Thyroid Function Test including FT3, FT4, and TSH to assess thyroid hormone balance. This package is especially beneficial for women who want a detailed metabolic, hormonal, and organ function evaluation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       The Diabetic Wellness Package is offered at ₹4499, reduced from ₹7000, giving a 36% discount. This package is specially designed for individuals who are diabetic or at high risk of developing diabetes. It includes Complete Blood Count (CBC), HbA1c for long-term glucose monitoring, Blood Sugar tests (Fasting and Postprandial), Electrocardiogram (ECG) to check heart health, 2D Echocardiography (2D Echo) for detailed heart imaging, Urine Analysis to detect infections or abnormalities, and Microalbumin Creatinine Ratio to assess early kidney damage due to diabetes. This comprehensive package helps in monitoring diabetes-related complications affecting the heart and kidneys.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The Healthy Child Wellness Package is available at ₹2599, discounted from ₹4670, offering a 44% discount. This package focuses on monitoring the growth and overall health of children. It includes Complete Blood Count (CBC) to evaluate general health, ESR to detect inflammation or infection, ALP (Alkaline Phosphatase) to assess bone growth and liver function, Serum Calcium for bone strength, Serum Creatinine for kidney function, Serum Phosphorus to monitor bone metabolism, and Liver Function Test (LFT) to evaluate liver health. This package is ideal for routine pediatric health monitoring and early detection of nutritional or metabolic concerns.

What are types of yoga treatment available ?
Sheet1.Column2: At All Is Well Hospital, a range of structured yoga treatments is available to support physical health, mental well-being, and overall lifestyle balance. The hospital offers multiple therapeutic yoga approaches tailored to different health needs. These include Hatha Yoga, Vinyasa Flow, Yin Yoga, Pranayama, Meditation and Mindfulness, and Yoga Therapy, each designed with specific benefits and therapeutic goals.                                                                                            Hatha Yoga focuses on traditional physical postures combined with controlled breathing techniques. This form of yoga helps improve balance, flexibility, muscle strength, and posture alignment. It is especially beneficial for beginners or individuals seeking a steady and foundational practice that enhances body awareness and supports overall physical stability.                                                                                                                                                                               Vinyasa Flow is a dynamic and energetic style of yoga that links movement with breath in a smooth, continuous sequence. It promotes cardiovascular fitness, muscular strength, endurance, and flexibility. Because of its fluid transitions between poses, Vinyasa Flow helps improve coordination and stamina while also encouraging mental focus and stress reduction.                                                                                                                                                                         Yin Yoga is a slow-paced and meditative practice that targets deep connective tissues such as ligaments, fascia, and joints. Poses are held for longer durations, allowing gradual and deep stretching. This approach improves joint mobility, enhances circulation, reduces stiffness, and promotes relaxation. Yin Yoga is particularly helpful for individuals experiencing stress, muscle tightness, or reduced flexibility.                                                                                             Pranayama involves structured breathing exercises designed to regulate and control the flow of life energy through the breath. These breathing techniques enhance lung capacity, improve oxygen circulation, reduce anxiety, and support mental clarity. Pranayama is often recommended for patients dealing with stress-related disorders, respiratory concerns, or those seeking improved concentration and emotional balance.                                                                                        Meditation and Mindfulness sessions focus on cultivating mental awareness, emotional stability, and inner calm. Through guided meditation techniques, patients learn to manage stress, reduce anxiety, improve focus, and enhance psychological well-being. This practice supports mental resilience and complements physical healing processes.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Treatments Available in Nutrition and diet ?
Sheet1.Column2: The Treatments Available in Nutrition and Diet focus on improving overall health, preventing diseases, and supporting specific medical conditions through scientifically designed dietary strategies. Personalized Meal Planning involves creating custom nutrition plans tailored to an individual’s health goals, medical history, lifestyle, and dietary preferences. This approach ensures balanced nutrient intake while addressing concerns such as weight control, nutrient deficiencies, food allergies, or specific health conditions. Weight Management provides structured support for healthy weight loss or weight gain through balanced eating plans, portion control, calorie management, and sustainable lifestyle modifications, helping individuals achieve long-term results safely. Diabetes Nutrition offers specialized dietary guidance to manage blood sugar levels effectively by focusing on carbohydrate control, glycemic index awareness, meal timing, and balanced nutrient intake to improve overall metabolic health. Sports Nutrition is designed for active individuals and athletes, offering science-backed dietary strategies to enhance performance, endurance, recovery, and muscle growth through proper macronutrient distribution, hydration, and supplementation when needed. Digestive Health treatment focuses on improving gut health by recommending fiber-rich foods, probiotics, elimination diets when necessary, and balanced nutrition plans to reduce digestive discomfort, bloating, acidity, or other gastrointestinal issues. Lastly, Nutrition Counseling provides one-on-one sessions with a qualified dietitian who offers education, personalized guidance, motivation, and accountability, helping individuals adopt healthier eating habits and maintain long-term wellness. Together, these nutrition and diet treatments aim to promote holistic health, prevent chronic diseases, and support individuals in achieving their specific health and lifestyle goals.

How much the radiology and imaging costs ?
Sheet1.Column2:
At All Is Well Hospital, the Radiology and Imaging Department offers a wide range of advanced diagnostic imaging services. The exact cost of each test depends on the type of scan, body part examined, contrast usage, and clinical requirements. Patients are advised to contact the billing counter for updated pricing.
The available radiology and imaging services include:
X-Ray: A quick and painless imaging test used to examine bones, chest, lungs, fractures, infections, and joint conditions. Charges vary depending on whether it is a single view or multiple views.
Ultrasound: A safe and non-invasive imaging test that uses sound waves to visualize internal organs such as the abdomen, pelvis, kidneys, liver, and pregnancy-related scans. Pricing depends on the type of ultrasound, such as whole abdomen, pelvis, obstetric scan, or targeted organ study.
MRI Scan: A highly detailed imaging technique using magnetic fields to visualize organs, soft tissues, joints, brain, and spine. MRI costs vary depending on whether it is with contrast or without contrast and which body region is scanned.
CT Scan: A cross-sectional imaging test used to detect internal injuries, tumors, infections, and complex bone conditions. Charges differ depending on the region scanned and whether contrast dye is used.
Mammography: A specialized breast imaging test used for early detection of breast abnormalities and cancer screening. Pricing depends on screening or diagnostic mammography.
Fluoroscopy: A real-time moving X-ray used during certain diagnostic or therapeutic procedures to observe internal organ function. Charges depend on procedure complexity.
For exact radiology pricing, patients should contact the front desk or billing department, as costs are case-specific.                                                                                                                                                                                                       The Pathology Department provides comprehensive laboratory diagnostic services. The cost of pathology tests varies depending on the number of parameters tested and whether they are part of a package.
Available pathology services include:
Complete Blood Count (CBC): Evaluates overall health and detects anemia, infection, and blood disorders. Cost depends on automated analysis and report detail.
Liver Function Test (LFT): Assesses liver enzyme levels and protein markers to evaluate liver health.
Kidney Function Test (KFT): Measures creatinine, urea, electrolytes, and kidney performance markers.
Thyroid Profile: Includes tests such as T3, T4, and TSH to diagnose thyroid imbalance.
Urine Routine & Microscopy: Detects urinary tract infections, kidney issues, and systemic abnormalities.
Blood Sugar Test: Includes fasting, postprandial, and random blood sugar levels to monitor diabetes.
Pathology charges vary individually or if included in health packages. For updated pricing, patients should consult the laboratory billing section. Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Visiting & Patients meeting

Sheet1.Column2: Flowers and outside food are not allowed in ICU/critical care areas. For general wards, please confirm with the nursing team before bringing such items.

Sheet1.Column2: Yes, one attendant may stay overnight in private rooms or designated guest rooms (102, 103, 221, 222), subject to availability and hospital policy.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Is there a charge for ambulance service, and how much?
Sheet1.Column2: Ambulance charges vary based on distance, type (basic/advanced), and equipment; please contact +91 76977 44444 for a case-specific quote.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Can ambulance pick up from my home or another location?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, our ambulances can pick up patients from home, workplaces, or other locations within Burhanpur and nearby areas—just share the exact address when booking.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: What details should I provide when calling for an ambulance?
Sheet1.Column2: Please share patient name, age, condition/symptoms, exact pickup location, contact number, and any special requirements (e.g., ventilator, wheelchair access).

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Can a family member accompany the patient in the ambulance?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, one attendant may accompany the patient in most cases; for advanced life-support ambulances, space may be limited—please confirm with the dispatch team.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Can you arrange ambulance for inter-hospital patient transfer?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, we coordinate safe inter-hospital transfers with appropriate medical support; please call +91 76977 44444 with patient details and destination hospital for arrangement.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Rooms & Patient Comfort
Can I see the room before confirming admission?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, you can request a brief room view before confirming admission; our admission desk staff will arrange this based on availability and patient priority.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Is an attendant bed or recliner provided in the room?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, private rooms and designated guest rooms (102, 103, 221, 222) include seating or recliner facilities for attendants; please confirm amenities at admission.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Are patient meals included in the room charge?
Sheet1.Column2: Basic hygienic meals are included in room charges; special or dietitian-approved diets can be arranged on request, with any additional costs communicated upfront.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Is WiFi available in patient rooms for family?
Sheet1.Column2: Complimentary WiFi is available in common areas; for in-room connectivity, please check with reception for current availability and access instructions.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Can I request a room closer to the nursing station?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, you can request a room near the nursing station for added convenience; we'll accommodate based on availability and medical priority.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Do private rooms have attached bathrooms?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, all private room categories (Diamond, Platinum, Golden, Silver, Ruby  Suite) include attached bathrooms with essential amenities for patient comfort and hygiene.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Can I change to a different room category after admission?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, room changes or upgrades are possible subject to availability, please discuss with the admission or billing desk for options and any additional charges.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Are there isolation rooms for infectious disease patients?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, we have designated isolation rooms and strict infection control protocols for infectious disease patients to ensure safety for all, please inform staff upon admission.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Do you provide bed linens, towels, and basic toiletries?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, all rooms are provided with clean bed linens, towels, and basic toiletries; additional items can be requested from nursing staff as needed.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Navigation & Hospital Facilities
Where is the nearest restroom or washroom?
Sheet1.Column2: Restrooms are available on every floor near the elevator lobbies and waiting areas; please follow the signage or ask any staff member for the closest one.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Is there a cafeteria, canteen, or food court inside?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, our cafeteria is located on the ground floor near the main lobby, serving hygienic vegetarian and non-vegetarian meals from 7 AM to 9 PM.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Where can I find safe drinking water?
Sheet1.Column2: Safe, filtered drinking water stations are available on all floors near waiting areas and nursing stations.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Is there an ATM or cash withdrawal facility on campus?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, an ATM is located for easy cash withdrawal, additional digital payment options are accepted throughout the hospital.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Where can I get a wheelchair or stretcher assistance?
Sheet1.Column2: Wheelchairs and stretchers are available free of charge at the reception desk, simply request assistance and our support staff will help you promptly.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Where can I buy patient care items like masks, gloves, or sanitizers?
Sheet1.Column2: Our 24/7 in-house pharmacy on the ground floor stocks masks, gloves, sanitizers, and other essential patient care items.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Patient Support & Communication
Is there a patient care coordinator or helpdesk I can contact?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, our Patient Care Desk at reception and the front desk team (+91 76977 44444) are available to assist with coordination, queries, and support throughout your hospital visit.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: How do I report a concern about staff behavior or service quality?
Sheet1.Column2: You can share feedback or concerns directly with the reception desk, call +91 76977 44444, or use the "Contact Us" form on our website; all feedback is reviewed promptly by our patient care team.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Can I seek a second opinion from another specialist in the hospital?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, you may request a second opinion from another in-house specialist; please discuss with your treating doctor or contact reception to coordinate the consultation.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: How can I receive regular updates on my patient's condition without being at bedside?
Sheet1.Column2: You can request periodic updates via phone or WhatsApp by providing your contact details to the nursing station; for ICU patients, updates are shared during designated visiting hours or as clinically appropriate.

Sheet1.HOSPITAL TEMI: Is there a waiting lounge with seating, charging points, or reading material?
Sheet1.Column2: Yes, we have comfortable waiting areas near OPD and main lobby with seating, drinking water, and basic amenities; charging points and reading material availability may vary—please ask reception for current facilities.

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: ऑल इज़ वेल हॉस्पिटल क्या है?
Sheet2.Column2: यह बुरहानपुर में स्थित एक मल्टी-स्पेशलिटी हॉस्पिटल है जो सस्ती और गुणवत्तापूर्ण स्वास्थ्य सेवा देता है।
यह हॉस्पिटल बच्चों, बुजुर्गों, महिलाओं और पुरुषों — सभी उम्र और जरूरतों के मरीजों के लिए है।

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: क्या यहाँ सभी बीमारियों का इलाज होता है?
Sheet2.Column2: जी हां, जनरल मेडिसिन से लेकर कार्डियोलॉजी, गायनेकोलॉजी, डेंटल और इमरजेंसी तक की सुविधाएं उपलब्ध हैं।

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: क्या हॉस्पिटल में डॉक्टर अनुभवी हैं?
Sheet2.Column2: जी हां, हमारे डॉक्टर योग्य, प्रशिक्षित और अपने क्षेत्र में अनुभवी विशेषज्ञ हैं।

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: क्या यहाँ 24 घंटे इमरजेंसी सेवा है?
Sheet2.Column2: जी हां, हमारी इमरजेंसी और ICU टीम 24 घंटे तैयार रहती है।

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: क्या हॉस्पिटल साफ-सुथरा और सुरक्षित है?

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: क्या मैं बिना अपॉइंटमेंट आ सकता हूं?

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: क्या यहाँ हिंदी में बात होती है?
Sheet2.Column2: जी हां, हमारी स्टाफ हिंदी और स्थानीय भाषा में आराम से बात कर सकती है।
जी हां, आपकी मेडिकल और निजी जानकारी पूरी तरह सुरक्षित और गोपनीय रहती है।

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: क्या हॉस्पिटल में व्हीलचेयर सुविधा है?
Sheet2.Column2: जी हां, हमारी इमारत व्हीलचेयर-फ्रेंडली है और सहायता उपलब्ध है।

Sheet2.Hindi Questions: क्या मैं फीडबैक दे सकता हूं?
Sheet2.Column2: जी हां, आप WhatsApp, वेबसाइट फॉर्म या रिसेप्शन पर अपना अनुभव साझा कर सकते हैं।
